title: Geronimo On Ice!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo must learn to ice-skate as a masked skater to protect the legendary Silver Skates from a cunning thief! ⛸️

q.en: What season is it in New Mouse City when the story begins?
q.zh: 故事开始时，新老鼠城是什么季节？

explain.en: It is a brisk winter afternoon with freshly fallen snow and holiday lights twinkling in the streets.
explain.zh: 那是一个清冷的冬日下午，刚下过雪，街上的节日彩灯闪闪发亮。

q.en: What prize will the winners of the couples skating category receive?
q.zh: 双人滑冰组的获胜者会得到什么奖品？

explain.en: The legendary Silver Skates are the unique prize, said to hold clues to a hidden royal treasure.
explain.zh: 奖品是传奇的银冰鞋，传说里面藏着一座皇家宝藏的线索。

q.en: According to legend, who originally owned the Silver Skates?
q.zh: 根据传说，银冰鞋最早属于谁？

options.en: Olga Goudanov, given to her by Czar Mousoloff
options.zh: 奥尔加·古丹诺夫，由穆索洛夫沙皇所赠

explain.en: The antique skates belonged to famous skater Olga Goudanov and were given to her by Czar Mousoloff after she invented the 'Flight of the Gouda'.
explain.zh: 这双古董冰鞋属于著名滑冰手奥尔加·古丹诺夫，她在发明「高达飞旋」后被穆索洛夫沙皇赠予。

q.en: Why are Hercule and Brutella Poirat disguised as the Masked Skaters?
q.zh: 赫丘利和布鲁特拉·波瓦为何要扮成「蒙面滑冰手」？

options.en: They are undercover to protect the Silver Skates from a thief
options.zh: 他们在暗中行动，保护银冰鞋不被偷走

options.en: They want to win the competition

explain.en: Someone tried to break into the arena director's office to steal the skates, so the director asked them to go undercover and watch the skaters.
explain.zh: 有人企图闯入冰场经理办公室偷鞋，经理请他们伪装成选手暗中盯紧滑冰手。

q.en: What does Geronimo call himself because he cannot skate?
q.zh: 因为不会滑冰，杰罗尼摩把自己叫做什么？

explain.en: On Lobelia's poster he is a level five mozzarella — as soon as he puts on skates he slips across the ice on his belly like a penguin.
explain.zh: 在洛贝莉亚的等级表上，他是「五段马苏里拉」——一上冰就肚皮贴地、像企鹅一样滑出去。

q.en: Who trains Geronimo to skate in the 'de-mozzarella course'?
q.zh: 是谁通过「去奶酪化特训」教杰罗尼摩滑冰的？

options.en: Lobelia Tutu, the world champion skater
options.zh: 世界冠军滑冰手洛贝莉亚·图图

explain.en: Lobelia Tutu, a famous skater who wears her Mouslympic gold medal, runs the intensive de-mozzarella course with Shane Shivers.
explain.zh: 著名滑冰手洛贝莉亚·图图戴着鼠奥会金牌，和肖恩·希弗斯一起给他做强化「去奶酪化」训练。

q.en: What color are Geronimo and Creepella's skating costumes?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩和克里佩拉的滑冰服是什么颜色？

explain.en: Creepella insists on purple, her favorite color, and they get wonderful purple 'Bats of the Night' outfits with purple satin masks.
explain.zh: 克里佩拉坚持要她最爱的紫色，于是两人穿上紫色的「暗夜蝙蝠」战袍，还配了紫色缎面面具。

q.en: During their performance, what does Geronimo notice above the glass roof?
q.zh: 表演途中，杰罗尼摩在玻璃穹顶上方发现了什么？

options.en: A helicopter hovering above the arena
options.zh: 一架在冰场上空盘旋的直升机

explain.en: He sees the shadow of a huge helicopter hovering over the glass roof and realizes someone may be trying to steal the Silver Skates.
explain.zh: 他看到一架巨大直升机的影子悬在玻璃穹顶上，立刻意识到有人可能要来偷银冰鞋。

q.en: Who is really behind the plot to steal the Silver Skates?
q.zh: 偷银冰鞋的阴谋幕后主使究竟是谁？

explain.en: Inside the helicopter, the rodent in leopard print grinning at them is revealed to be Madame No, who wants the treasure clues.
explain.zh: 直升机里那个穿豹纹、冲他们坏笑的老鼠，正是想要宝藏线索的诺夫人。

q.en: What do Anastasia Goudanov and Paolo Pivot turn out to be?
q.zh: 阿娜斯塔西娅·古丹诺夫和保罗·皮沃特的真实身份是什么？

options.en: Shadow the super spy and one of Madame No's bodyguards
options.zh: 超级间谍「暗影」和诺夫人手下的一个保镖

explain.en: Anastasia removes her red wig to reveal Shadow the super spy, and Paolo puts on black glasses to show he is one of Madame No's bodyguards.
explain.zh: 阿娜斯塔西娅摘下红假发，露出超级间谍「暗影」；保罗戴上黑墨镜，表明自己是诺夫人手下的保镖。
